overall.description: A third-person gameplay sequence from a cinematic video game showing a character in a dark coat walking along a foggy coastal beach. The character traverses shallow water and passes large rock formations emerging from the mist, with steep cliffs visible on the left side throughout the journey.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy coastal shoreline with steep cliffs

events.description: large rock formations emerge from the fog ahead as the character approaches the water's edge

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the foggy beach toward the water, approaching large rock formations in the distance

entered.detail: steep rocky cliff covered in sparse vegetation rising on the left side
green bushes and grasses growing along the cliff base
massive reddish-brown rock outcropping emerging from the fog and shallow water
calm shallow seawater lapping at the sandy shore

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a foggy coastal beach at dawn, with the character walking along the shoreline. Steep cliffs rise on the left while large rock formations loom ahead through the mist. The character moves steadily forward through shallow water as the massive rocks gradually become more defined against the gray fog.

scene_state.functional_zone: shallow coastal waters with massive rock outcroppings

events.description: character passes the first large reddish rock formation on the left, entering deeper water

agents.ego_description: navigating through shallow water, passing closely by massive rock formations on the left while heading toward open water

entered.detail: massive reddish-brown boulder with rough texture rising from the water
distant rock formation with arch-like shape visible through the fog
deeper greenish seawater extending to the foggy horizon

segments.scene_description: The character moves through shallow coastal waters, passing massive reddish rock formations that tower on the left side. The scene transitions from the cliff-lined shore to a more open aquatic environment as the character navigates between the large rocks and the open sea, with the fog persisting throughout.

scene_state.functional_zone: open foggy beach with distant rocks fading into mist

events.description: fog slightly lifts revealing more detail of the open sea and distant horizon

agents.ego_description: continuing along the foggy shoreline, moving away from the rock formations into more open beach area

entered.detail: expansive fog-covered ocean stretching to the horizon with gentle waves
sparse grasses and small bushes along the water's edge

segments.scene_description: The character moves beyond the rock formations into a more open foggy beach environment. The large rocks fade into the mist behind as the character continues walking through shallow water along the coastline. The fog persists but lifts slightly, revealing more of the calm open sea stretching into the gray distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a foggy coastline that transitions from a cliff-lined shore to an open, misty beach. It begins with the character walking through shallow water at dawn, moving toward massive rock formations that loom through a dense gray fog beneath steep cliffs. As the character advances, the scene shifts into a more aquatic environment, navigating between towering reddish rocks and the open sea. The camera then follows the character beyond these formations as the rocks fade into the mist behind them. Finally, the fog lifts slightly to reveal a vast, calm sea stretching into the gray distance as the character continues along the open shoreline.
